title: C3 UI consolidation + derive-once + PDF empty-page guard
acceptance_criteria: C3: delete the duplicated deriveComplianceStatus / keyword list / MODULE_FRAMEWORKS / FRAMEWORK_ORDER copies in report-view.tsx and print-report.tsx and import them from src/lib/scanner/compliance-shared.ts (created by FIX-02). Rendered output must be unchanged for any given finding set
Perf/Arch Low: in ComplianceSection (report-view.tsx) derive each finding's status ONCE (e.g. a useMemo map) and reuse it in both the framework panel and the raw-findings list — no double derivation

Perf Low: in print-report.tsx, do NOT emit the compliance section/page when there are zero P5 findings (old/back-compat scans must not gain a blank compliance page or TOC entry); page/section numbering stays correct when present
Back-compat: scans with no P5 findings render the existing neutral empty state in the web report; print simply omits the section. No numeric/score/verdict introduced
`npm run lint` clean (no new errors); `npx tsc --noEmit` clean; `npm run build` succeeds
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
